plugins.name: nansen-core
plugins.description: Shared intelligence foundation for the Nansen team. Extract, structure, and sync domain knowledge to Google Drive. Includes /setup, /onboarding, and Market Research skill.

plugins.name: nansen-growth
plugins.description: Growth domain plugin for business development. Proactive industry research and solutions positioning that maps client needs to Nansen capabilities.

plugins.name: nansen-delivery
plugins.description: Delivery domain plugin for project management. Budget pulse health checks, retainer utilisation tracking, and team allocation monitoring via Scoro.

plugins.name: nansen-agent-studio
plugins.description: Developer tools for building Optimizely Opal agents. Schema validation, CLEAR prompt framework, agent spec builder, and onboarding for new developers.
